articles.title: A royal family dined at a popular Somerville restaurant this week
articles.description:
Belgium’s crown princess made a stop at one of Greater Boston’s most in-demand restaurants ahead of her Harvard Kennedy School graduation.

The post A royal family dined at a popular Somerville restaurant this week appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Belgium's Crown Princess visited a Somerville restaurant this week before her graduation.
The restaurant is among Greater Boston's most in-demand dining spots.
Her visit highlights Boston's appeal to international figures and boosts local tourism.

articles.title: What to know about the rejection of Healey’s Parole Board nominee as backlash builds
articles.description:
Gov. Maura Healey nominated a seasoned prosecutor for the Parole Board. A heated debate ensued.

The post What to know about the rejection of Healey’s Parole Board nominee as backlash builds appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gov. Maura Healey's Parole Board nominee was rejected amid public backlash.
The nominee, a seasoned prosecutor, faced significant opposition from community groups.
This rejection may delay reforms in the parole system affecting Boston residents.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel talks offseason distractions, potential trades, and more
articles.description:
"My focus and the excitement I have for coaching is what is most important right now. This is a great opportunity, the spring."

The post Mike Vrabel talks offseason distractions, potential trades, and more appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mike Vrabel emphasizes focus on coaching during offseason activities for the Patriots.
Vrabel discusses potential trades as the NFL offseason progresses in spring 2026.
Local fans can expect strategic changes impacting the team's performance this upcoming season.
